🔩 Trauma FixationREF: PFRN✓ Brochure Verified

PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail

· Proximal Femoral Nails

A comprehensive intramedullary nailing system designed for the treatment of various long bone fractures, bone tumors, and deformities. The system includes anatomically shaped nails for the femur and tibia, specialized locking bolts, and dedicated instrument sets to ensure smooth and trouble-free operating procedures.

MaterialTAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb)
WhatsApp Quote

PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail (PFRN) Range
Diameters: 9.0mm, 10.0mm, 11.0mm, 12.0mm; Lengths: 170mm to 440mm; Material: TAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb)
Cannulated Titanium Tibial Nail (CTTN) Range
Diameters: 8.0mm, 9.0mm, 10.0mm, 11.0mm, 12.0mm, 13.0mm; Lengths: 255mm to 450mm; Material: TAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb)
Elastic Titanium Nail (TEN) Range
Diameters: 1.5mm, 2.0mm, 2.5mm, 3.0mm, 3.5mm, 4.0mm; Lengths: 300mm to 440mm; Material: TAV (Ti-6Al-4V)
Shaft Femur Titanium Nail Cannulated Range
Diameters: 9.0mm, 10.0mm, 11.0mm, 12.0mm; Lengths: 340mm to 440mm; Material: TAN (ASTM-F1295-11)
Shaft Tibia Titanium Nail Cannulated Range
Diameters: 8.0mm, 9.0mm, 10.0mm; Lengths: 280mm to 380mm; Material: TAN (ASTM-F1295-11)
Anti-Rotation Screw for PFRN
Diameter: 12mm; Lengths: 75mm to 120mm; Material: TAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb)
4.9mm Locking Bolt, Self Tapping
Head Dia: 8.0mm; Outer Dia: 4.9mm; Core Dia: 4.25mm; Pitch: 2.75mm; Lengths: 26mm to 100mm
3.9mm Locking Bolt Self Tapping
Head Dia: 8.0mm; Outer Dia: 3.9mm; Core Dia: 3.25mm; Pitch: 2.3mm; Lengths: 22mm to 60mm; Material: TAV (Ti-6Al-4V)
4.0mm Locking Screw Medullary Nail
Head Dia: 8.0mm; Outer Dia: 3.9mm; Core Dia: 3.25mm; Pitch: 1.25mm; Lengths: 18mm to 80mm; Material: TAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb)

Primary Material

TAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb)

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail for femur bone fractures with anatomical design for best fit and M/L angle of 5 degree for easy insertion and bendable tip to reduce stress on bone

This product is manufactured by Meril Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail is constructed using TAN (Ti-6Al-7Nb), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
